name: personal-workbench
description: A calm desktop workbench for persistent web tools and PowerShell.

scripts.check: node --check main.js && node --check preload.js && node --check preload-popup.js && node --check renderer.js
scripts.test: npm run check && node --test tests/parse-cards-document.test.js tests/parse-todo-lines.test.js tests/security-v34-regression.test.js
scripts.test:e2e: node tests/smoke.e2e.js && node tests/cards-bay.e2e.js && node tests/p1-defects.e2e.js && node tests/security-http.e2e.js
